headline: Foundayo Oral GLP 1 Approval Tests Eli Lilly Valuation Story
summary: The U.S. FDA has approved Eli Lilly's Foundayo, orforglipron, as the first once daily oral GLP 1 treatment for obesity and overweight adults with weight related medical problems. Foundayo does not require food or water restrictions and is planned for broad availability through Lilly's direct to consumer platform and retail channels. The launch is backed by efficacy data from the ATTAIN trials and a planned rollout in more than 40 countries. Eli Lilly, NYSE:LLY, is adding a new pillar to its...

headline: Trump’s obesity drug plan for Medicare would cost insurers billions
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump’s plan to cover weight-loss medications for some people in the Medicare program for the elderly would cost the health insurers billions in its first year, a new analysis found. The Trump administration has argued that the lower prices it negotiated with drugmakers last year would offset the cost of adding coverage for millions of new patients. The plan will “expand access and lower prices for obesity GLP-1 medication without passing the bill to taxpayers,” M

headline: RO LAUNCHES ELI LILLY'S KWIKPEN®, OFFERING PATIENTS A MORE CONVENIENT WAY TO TAKE ZEPBOUND®

headline: Alkermes Starts Phase 3 Orexin Trials As Narcolepsy Story Builds
summary: Alkermes (NasdaqGS:ALKS) has started Phase 3 Brilliance Studies for alixorexton, an orexin 2 receptor agonist for narcolepsy type 1 and 2. The program builds on the drug's breakthrough therapy designation and moves it into late stage clinical testing. The news follows increased sector attention after Eli Lilly acquired a company with competing orexin receptor drug candidates. For investors watching Alkermes, the move into Phase 3 comes as the share price sits at $35.05, with the stock up...
